mapper.select:
SELECT R.ID, R.COMP_CD, R.RFX_NO, R.RFX_TYP, R.RFX_TITLE, TO_CHAR(R.OPEN_YMD,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS OPEN_YMD, TO_CHAR(R.CLOSE_YMD,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS CLOSE_YMD, R.SEL_VD_CD, R.SEL_VD_NM, R.STS, C.CD_NM_KO AS STS_NM, R.REG_ID, TO_CHAR(R.REG_DT,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS REG_DT FROM RX_RFX R LEFT JOIN CM_CODE C ON C.GRP_CD='RFX_STS' AND C.CD=R.STS AND C.DEL_YN='N' WHERE R.DEL_YN='N'
AND (R.RFX_NO LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR R.RFX_TITLE LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%')
AND R.STS = #{sts} ORDER BY R.ID DESC

SELECT R.ID, R.RFX_NO, R.RFX_TYP, R.RFX_TITLE, TO_CHAR(R.OPEN_YMD,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS OPEN_YMD, TO_CHAR(R.CLOSE_YMD,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS CLOSE_YMD, R.SEL_VD_CD, R.STS, C.CD_NM_KO AS STS_NM FROM RX_RFX R JOIN RX_RFX_VENDOR V ON V.RFX_ID = R.ID AND V.VD_CD = #{vdCd} LEFT JOIN CM_CODE C ON C.GRP_CD='RFX_STS' AND C.CD=R.STS AND C.DEL_YN='N' WHERE R.DEL_YN='N' AND R.STS IN ('OPEN','SEL') ORDER BY R.ID DESC

SELECT R.ID, R.COMP_CD, R.RFX_NO, R.RFX_TYP, R.RFX_TITLE, R.PURC_GRP_CD, R.CHRG_USR_ID, TO_CHAR(R.OPEN_YMD,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS OPEN_YMD, TO_CHAR(R.CLOSE_YMD,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS CLOSE_YMD, R.EVAL_TYP, R.CURR_CD, R.SRC_TYP, R.SRC_ID, R.SEL_VD_CD, R.SEL_VD_NM, R.STS, C.CD_NM_KO AS STS_NM, R.REMARK, R.REG_ID, TO_CHAR(R.REG_DT,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS REG_DT FROM RX_RFX R LEFT JOIN CM_CODE C ON C.GRP_CD='RFX_STS' AND C.CD=R.STS AND C.DEL_YN='N' WHERE R.ID = #{id} AND R.DEL_YN='N'
SELECT ID, RFX_ID, LINE_NO, PR_ITEM_ID, ITEM_CD, ITEM_NM, SPEC, UNIT_CD, QTY, BASE_PRC FROM RX_RFX_ITEM WHERE RFX_ID = #{rfxId} ORDER BY LINE_NO
SELECT ID, RFX_ID, VD_CD, VD_NM, RESP_YN, SEL_YN, QUOTE_TOT_AMT, TO_CHAR(QUOTE_YMD,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS QUOTE_YMD FROM RX_RFX_VENDOR WHERE RFX_ID = #{rfxId} ORDER BY VD_CD
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO RX_RFX (COMP_CD, RFX_NO, RFX_TYP, RFX_TITLE, PURC_GRP_CD, CHRG_USR_ID, OPEN_YMD, CLOSE_YMD, EVAL_TYP, CURR_CD, SRC_TYP, SRC_ID, STS, REMARK, REG_ID, MOD_ID) VALUES (#{compCd}, #{rfxNo}, NVL(#{rfxTyp},'RFQ'), #{rfxTitle}, #{purcGrpCd}, #{chrgUsrId}, TO_DATE(#{openYmd},'YYYY-MM-DD'), TO_DATE(#{closeYmd},'YYYY-MM-DD'), NVL(#{evalTyp},'PRICE'), NVL(#{currCd},'KRW'), #{srcTyp}, #{srcId}, NVL(#{sts},'TMP'), #{remark}, #{regId}, #{regId})
mapper.update: UPDATE RX_RFX SET RFX_TITLE=#{rfxTitle}, PURC_GRP_CD=#{purcGrpCd}, OPEN_YMD=TO_DATE(#{openYmd},'YYYY-MM-DD'), CLOSE_YMD=TO_DATE(#{closeYmd},'YYYY-MM-DD'), EVAL_TYP=#{evalTyp}, CURR_CD=#{currCd}, REMARK=#{remark}, MOD_ID=#{modId}, MOD_DT=SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE ID=#{id}
UPDATE RX_RFX SET STS=#{sts}, MOD_ID=#{modId}, MOD_DT=SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE ID=#{id}
UPDATE RX_RFX SET SEL_VD_CD=#{vdCd}, SEL_VD_NM=#{vdNm}, MOD_ID=#{modId}, MOD_DT=SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE ID=#{id}
UPDATE RX_RFX SET DEL_YN='Y', MOD_ID=#{modId}, MOD_DT=SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE ID=#{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO RX_RFX_ITEM (RFX_ID, LINE_NO, PR_ITEM_ID, ITEM_CD, ITEM_NM, SPEC, UNIT_CD, QTY, BASE_PRC, REG_ID) VALUES (#{rfxId}, #{lineNo}, #{prItemId}, #{itemCd}, #{itemNm}, #{spec}, #{unitCd}, NVL(#{qty},0), NVL(#{basePrc},0), 'SYSTEM')
INSERT INTO RX_RFX_VENDOR (RFX_ID, VD_CD, VD_NM, REG_ID) VALUES (#{rfxId}, #{vdCd}, #{vdNm}, 'SYSTEM')
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM RX_QUOTE_ITEM WHERE RFX_ID=#{rfxId} AND VD_CD=#{vdCd}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO RX_QUOTE_ITEM (RFX_ID, VD_CD, RFX_ITEM_ID, OFFER_PRC, OFFER_AMT, DLV_YMD, REMARK, REG_ID) VALUES (#{rfxId}, #{vdCd}, #{rfxItemId}, NVL(#{offerPrc},0), NVL(#{offerAmt},0), TO_DATE(#{dlvYmd},'YYYY-MM-DD'), #{remark}, 'SYSTEM')
mapper.update: UPDATE RX_RFX_VENDOR SET RESP_YN='Y', QUOTE_TOT_AMT=#{totAmt}, QUOTE_YMD=SYSDATE WHERE RFX_ID=#{rfxId} AND VD_CD=#{vdCd}
UPDATE RX_RFX_VENDOR SET SEL_YN='N' WHERE RFX_ID=#{rfxId}
UPDATE RX_RFX_VENDOR SET SEL_YN='Y' WHERE RFX_ID=#{rfxId} AND VD_CD=#{vdCd}
